title: NYC governed routing foundations

missions.sourceText: Walk from Union Square to Washington Square.
Bike from Union Square to Washington Square and keep me within 200 meters of a bike rack.
Ride a scooter from Union Square to North Williamsburg.
Drive from Union Square to North Williamsburg.
Deliver the parcel by bike from Union Square to Washington Square, then East Village, then North Williamsburg.
Run 5 laps around Union Square Park perimeter.
Run around McCarren Park perimeter for 2 miles.
Walk from Tompkins Square to Washington Square starting at 4 pm and arrive by 5 pm, only in daylight.

claimBoundary: Completion proves deterministic governed-simulator journeys for the pinned mission texts and world revision. It does not certify physical navigation competence, road legality, or real-world safety.
